implementation_summary: Removed onApplicationMessage as a positional parameter from subscribeToGroupMessages in welcomeSubscription.ts. EpochResolver still receives the required EpochResolverCallbacks.onApplicationMessage field but as an internal no-op — application rumor dispatch is owned exclusively by the unified dispatcher that listens on group.on('applicationMessage'). In MarmotContext.tsx the empty (_rumor) => {} argument was removed from the subscribeToGroupMessages call site, leaving only onMembersChanged and onHistorySynced callbacks. epochResolver.ts was not modified.
